untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'material news events' (litigation verdicts, bankruptcy-level events) which cannot be expressed using only price/volume/technical indicators. News sentiment detection and event classification require external data feeds not in the allowed indicator set. The 60-minute time window and thesis invalidation logic also require event timestamp integration and position metadata (entry thesis) that exceed indicator-based rule capability.
translation_notes: Partially translated exit logic: implemented the 3% price move threshold (±0.03 in decimal scale) as a mechanical trigger using returns indicator within a 60-minute window. However, the core signal depends on news materiality assessment, thesis context, and fundamental analysis—none of which can be expressed through technical indicators alone. A backtest engine would need: (1) external news feed integration, (2) position entry thesis logging, (3) event-driven rule execution, and (4) fundamental data sources to fully implement this rule. Current JSON captures only the price-action confirmation component (3% move requirement).
